title: The Island’s Old Wounds Remain
description: On pages 19–20, this part focuses on Jinbe, Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5. The core beat is the island’s old wounds remain.
scene: The scene follows the island’s old wounds remain, keeping the focus on Jinbe, Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5.

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: HORDY HATES THE HUMANS EVEN MORE THAN ARLONG-SAN EVER DID...

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: He was raised on all the resentment and hatred that our race have suffered...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Government companies

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: But there is one important way in which he is very different from arlong-san....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Arlong-san detested humans, but also had a great respect for his own kind; he would never lift a finger against a fellow fish-man.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But hordy thinks nothing of victimising his fellow fishermen...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...if they show sympathy towards the humans....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the year of the Reverie, the council of Kings that comes around once every four years...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and the princes have gathered all those signatures....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the year when King Neptune should finally be able...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to declare to the world our people's intent to move fish-man island to the surface....!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and hordy means to put a stop to that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nyuuu... no... his plans are much bigger than that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Ahhh hah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A giant den-den mushi came out of the forest!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Stare

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's a visual den-den mushi. It's going to activate a monitor...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ahh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ahem... people of fish-man island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Can you hear me...?

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: I am the captain of the new fish-man pirates, from the fish-man district...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HORDY ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: My name is HORDY Jones ...!!!

summary: The Island’s Old Wounds Remain. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
